required_before_confirming: Endpoint URL or symbol input is known and reproducible.
Response body, structured output, or sufficiently complete log is available.
App/tool, encoding, rate limit, market timing, and endpoint expectation checks are considered.
Evidence meets the classification rule threshold.
Endpoint, security type, symbols, field paths, and market state scope are documented where applicable.
Confirmed change is captured in versioned project data.
README/CHANGELOG/MANIFEST reference the confirmed change or review-system update.
